entities.name: METALAXYL
entities.description: Fungicide used as a seed treatment to control downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: DOWNY MILDEW
entities.description: A disease caused by Sclerospora graminicola that affects pearl millet

entities.name: SCLEROSPORA GRAMINICOLA
entities.description: The organism that causes downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop being treated with metalaxyl to control downy mildew

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The location where metalaxyl has been used extensively to control downy mildew in pearl millet

entities.name: FUNGICIDE DOSAGE
entities.description: The amount of metalaxyl applied per kilogram of seed, which affects disease incidence

entities.name: STORAGE TIME
entities.description: The duration for which metalaxyl-treated seeds are stored, potentially affecting fungicide efficacy

entities.name: STORAGE TEMPERATURE
entities.description: The temperature at which metalaxyl-treated seeds are stored, affecting efficacy and phytotoxicity

entities.name: DISEASE INCIDENCE
entities.description: The occurrence of downy mildew in pearl millet lines, influenced by fungicide dosage and resistance

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The varying levels of ability in pearl millet lines to resist downy mildew

entities.name: 7042S
entities.description: A highly susceptible pearl millet line

entities.name: 4042R
entities.description: A moderately susceptible pearl millet line

entities.name: ICMP 451
entities.description: A moderately resistant pearl millet line

entities.name: 843B
entities.description: A pearl millet line that showed significant downy mildew incidence and phytotoxic effects

entities.name: SEED GERMINATION
entities.description: The process of seed sprouting, which can be inhibited by phytotoxic effects

entities.name: PHYTOTOXIC EFFECTS
entities.description: Harmful effects caused by metalaxyl treatment, especially at high storage temperatures
